title: caruelina occidentalis
intro: Caruelina occidentalis, also known as American snailseed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain due to its iridoid glycosides content. The health benefits of Caruelina occidentalis include its potential to treat anxiety, insomnia, and respiratory issues, as well as its antimicrobial properties that aid in wound healing. Caruelina occidentalis can be prepared for herbal use through infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a versatile medicinal plant in traditional medicine.
